daily_summary.headline: SpaceX Starlink Launches and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 storm level aurora is predicted with a Kp of 4.67, offering potential visibility at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check viewing conditions at high latitudes.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-18
top_events.description: Launch of 25 Starlink satellites for SpaceX's internet constellation.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch details.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | EchoStar 25
top_events.description: Launch of EchoStar 25 satellite for direct broadcast services.
top_events.action: Follow launch updates for broadcast services.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
